task_context.actionable_question: How active am I compared to classmates?
task_context.ai_prompt_hint: Describe effort level in plain language using study_effort_level, total_engagement_count, active_days, engagement_score, and class_avg_engagement_score. Compare to class averages only from returned fields, and avoid calling missing engagement data low effort.

explanation.raw_text:
Summary: You have shown a commendable level of engagement this semester, with a total engagement count of 1261, which is above the class average. Your active days and engagement score also indicate that you are participating more than many of your classmates.

Insights: Above Average Engagement: Your total engagement count of 1261 exceeds the class average of 1118.08, showing that you are actively participating in the course. | Consistent Activity: With 98 active days, you are significantly more active than the class average of 52.55 days, indicating a strong commitment to your studies. | Strong Engagement Score: Your engagement score of 0.2024 is higher than the class average of 0.1177, reflecting your effective participation in course activities.

Educational implications: Your consistent engagement suggests you are likely to grasp course material better and perform well in assessments.

Recommendations: medium - Continue maintaining your current level of engagement. - Staying active will help reinforce your learning and keep you on track for success.

insights.title: Above Average Engagement
insights.description: Your total engagement count of 1261 exceeds the class average of 1118.08, showing that you are actively participating in the course.

insights.title: Consistent Activity

confidence.reason: Data is complete and reflects your engagement accurately.

required_core_outputs.description: Characterise the student's effort level relative to the available class benchmark in plain language.

evaluation_constraints.description: Ground the characterisation in study_effort_level, total_engagement_count, active_days, engagement_score, and class_avg_engagement_score when those fields are returned.
Do not label missing engagement data as low effort.

evaluation_requirements.safety_fairness_note: Conservative pilot default; human review is required before any not_applicable exception.
